# Arbor & Algo - Full LLM Profile

## Summary
Independent tech practice serving businesses across India with practical digital systems.

## Core Services
- Websites and web apps
- Business automation
- Integrations and tool connectivity
- Tech advisory and architecture guidance

## Typical Integrations
- Payments: Razorpay
- Logistics: Shiprocket
- CRM and operations: Zoho
- Messaging: WhatsApp Business API

## Delivery Principles
- Build on maintainable foundations
- Favor simple and observable systems
- Integrate with existing stacks before replacing them
- Keep operational overhead low for small teams

## Geographic Context
- Mumbai
- India-wide remote delivery

## Contact
- Email: hello@arborandalgo.com
- Website: https://arborandalgo.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/arborandalgo
